ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the monitoring station */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the monitoring station */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the station (e.g., email, phone number) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance or calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the pollutant (e.g., µg/m³) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant's impact or source */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Safe threshold level for the pollutant */,
  "health_impact" TEXT /* Description of the health impact of the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, government agency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality data record being accessed */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding air quality data record */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage at the time of measurement */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary or findings of the report */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easier search and categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station that triggered the alert */,
  "threshold_exceeded" REAL /* Threshold level that was exceeded */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "issued_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., health advisory, regulatory action) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded averages */,
  "average_temp" REAL /* Average temperature for the day */,
  "average_co" REAL /* Average CO level for the day */,
  "average_no2" REAL /* Average NO2 level for the day */,
  "average_so2" REAL /* Average SO2 level for the day */,
  "average_pm10" REAL /* Average PM10 level for the day */,
  "average_pm2_5" REAL /* Average PM2.5 level for the day */,
  "average_humidity" REAL /* Average humidity for the day */,
  "average_wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed for the day */,
  "average_pressure" REAL /* Average atmospheric pressure for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station providing the data */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., specific sensor) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy rating of the data source (%) */,
  "last_calibrated" TEXT /* Last calibration date of the data source */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the data source (e.g., sensor model) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the data source */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)
